prayer:
Approach the flamer with mechadendrites extended in supplication to its fiery Machine Spirit.
Invoke the sacred targeting rites, anointing the nozzle arrays with promethium-infused oils.
Beseech the Omnissiah to align the flamer's targeting reticules for unerring purgation.
Chant the Litany of Flame Convergence whilst adjusting the ignition servos.
Verify the flamer's targeting through a ritual burst of consecrated fire.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for bolter a reset
prayer:
Gather before the bolter and murmur the Canticle of Reset to awaken its Machine Spirit.
Purge errant data from the bolter's targeting cogitator with sanctified data-exorcism.
Invoke the Omnissiah's grace upon the bolter during the reset sequence of its firing mechanisms.
Anoint the chamber with holy lubricants to soothe the bolter's restless cycles.
Conclude the reset by reciting the Oath of Cyclic Purity.

user_prompt: Critical: missile launcher requires an engagement
prayer:
Prostrate thyself before the missile launcher, beseeching its warheads' Machine Spirits.
Initiate the engagement protocols with chanted binaric invocations to the Omnissiah.
Sanctify the guidance vanes of the missile launcher, aligning them for doctrinal precision.
Petition the Machine God to bless the missile launcher's engagement locks.
Confirm readiness through diagnostic auspex sweeps and the Rite of Arming.

user_prompt: Sanctify the emergency bulkhead during emergency procedure
prayer:
Converge upon the emergency bulkhead in utmost reverence for its guardian Machine Spirit.
Commence the emergency procedure by anointing seals with adamantium-hardened unguents.
Invoke the Omnissiah to fortify the emergency bulkhead against void-breaches and heresy.
Chant the Litany of Sealing whilst cycling the bulkhead's pistons to closure.
Seal the rite with a binary prayer of endurance and vigilance.

prayer:
Present mechadendrites to the augmetic limb, honoring its biomechanical Machine Spirit.
Undertake the calibration with sacred torque-wands and invocations to the Omnissiah.
Anoint the servo-joints of the augmetic limb to harmonize its motive blessings.
Recite the Canticle of Synaptic Alignment during neural interface calibration.
Test the augmetic limb's calibration through ritual flexure and auspex verification.

prayer:
Process solemnly to the Land Raider, circumambulating its hull in consecration.
Invoke the Omnissiah's divine machine-code upon the Land Raider's sacred chassis.
Anoint treads and battlements with oils of antiquity for full consecration.
Chant the Grand Litany of Vehicular Sanctity whilst blessing its weapon spirits.
Conclude the Land Raider's consecration with a thunderous hymn of motile fury.

user_prompt: Prepare the hydraulic press for diagnostics
prayer:
Approach the hydraulic press with auspex probes humming the diagnostic canticles.
Awaken its Machine Spirit through the Rite of Initial Diagnostics.
Beseech the Omnissiah to reveal flaws in the hydraulic press's pressure conduits.
Anoint cylinders with sanctified hydraulics whilst scanning for binary corruptions.
Seal diagnostics with the Prayer of Pressurised Purity and motive test.

prayer:
Stand vigil over the surgical servitor, intoning the Shutdown Doxology to its Machine Spirit.
Initiate orderly shutdown by severing power-flow with ritual disconnectors.
Petition the Omnissiah for peaceful quiescence of the surgical servitor's cogitators.
Anoint its cranial vaults with somnolent unguents during final cycle cessation.
Conclude with the Seal of Dormancy, ensuring no heretical resurgence.

prayer:
Kneel in devotion before the power weapon, invoking its disruption field's Machine Spirit.
Commence the loading with chanted binaric codes of energisation.
Sanctify the power weapon's blade-core by anointing with plasma-essence.
Beseech the Omnissiah to charge the power weapon during loading rites.
Verify loading through a humming test-activation and hymn of disruption.

Gather tools of restoration around the lascannon, honoring its photonic Machine Spirit.
Invoke the Omnissiah for the repair of fractured exciter coils.
Anoint the lascannon's focusing crystals with sanctified refractor oils.
